errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.message: The application encountered an error. Please try again.

empty.title: Start a Conversation
empty.subtitle: Type a message below to chat with AI

input.placeholder: Type a message... (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)

chat.noModelHint: No models configured. Go to Settings to add one.
chat.needApiKey: Please configure an API Key in Settings first

models.name: Name
models.empty: No models yet. Click [Add] above to configure one.

shortcuts.help: Click a shortcut → press keys → release to save. Max 3 keys. Esc to cancel.

skills.title: Skills Marketplace
skills.desc: Skills are specialized capability packs for the AI assistant. Once installed, the AI will automatically load relevant skills to enhance performance in specific domains.
skills.noInstalled: No skills installed yet. Go to the Marketplace to discover more.
skills.noMarket: No skills available. Check your network connection.
skills.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to uninstall "{{name}}"?

tools.title: Tools / MCP
tools.desc: Connect MCP servers so the AI can call external tools (file ops, web search) during chat. Tools are triggered automatically by the LLM via function calling.
tools.empty: No MCP servers added yet. Use the form below to add one.
tools.name: Name
tools.needFields: Please fill in name and command
tools.noTools: No tools available yet. Connect an MCP server first.

about.tech: Built with Tauri v2 + React + Rust

browser.loadError: Failed to load page. Check the URL or network connection.
browser.blockedMessage: This website doesn't allow embedding. Open in your external browser.
